title: IPO payments: 2025
body: "The information is based on payment date and published in monthly comma delimited files. Each record is made up of standard fields which are used across all departments.  These are:   department family - The Department for Business, Energy & Industrial Strategy entity - The Intellectual Property Office date - payment date expense type - type of expenditure from our the accounting system expense area - the area of the Office paying for the expense supplier - the supplier of the goods or services transaction number - a reference to identify the transaction amount - the amount in pounds VAT registration number - supplier number not published   IPO payments: 2020 IPO payments: 2021 IPO payments: 2022 IPO payments: 2023 IPO payments: 2024  Pre-2014 payment datasets are available from The National Archives. "
